title: UK Export Finance Country Heads and London Team - APAC
body: "Team Asia- Pacific (London Office)  Interim Global Co-Head of Origination   Alexander Milne      Email alexander.milne@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Regional Head   Sean Burnage      Email sean.burnage@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Senior Business Origination Officer   Jack Hebb      Email jack.hebb@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Regional Head, China   Francois Pannetier     Email francois.pannetier@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Business Development Officer, China   Charlotte Kemp      Email charlotte.kemp@ukexportfinance.gov.uk         Country Heads (By Region)  China   Jiang Wu 吴江   Based at the British Embassy Beijing11 Guang Hua Lu, Jian Guo Men Wai100600 Beijing China     Email wu.jiang@fcdo.gov.uk         Indonesia and Singapore   Richard Michael   Based at the British Embassy JakartaJl. Patra Kuningan Raya Blok L5-6Jakarta 12950Indonesia     Email richard.michael@fcdo.gov.uk         Korea   Chulbohm (CB) Kim   Based the British Embassy in SeoulConsular Section,  British Embassy in Seoul Sejong-daero 19-gil 24 Jung-gu Seoul 04519 South Korea     Email chulbohm.kim@fcdo.gov.uk         Malaysia, Philippines and Thailand   Valentino Dass   Based at the British High Commission Kuala LumpurLevel 27 Menara Binjai, 2 Jln BinjaiKuala Lumpur50450Malaysia     Email valentino.dass@fco.gov.uk         Vietnam, Cambodia and Laos   Harry Nguyen   25 Le Duan streetDistrict 01Ho Chi Minh cityVietnam     Email nguyen.dohoa@fcdo.gov.uk        "
